code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    emit(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

fn emit(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut sum = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut tok = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    let b = if at_end
      -1
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        -1
      end
    end
    let is_space = at_end or b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          sum = sum + v
          if string.is_empty(out)
            out = "#{sum}"
          else
            out = "#{out} #{sum}"
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
